raw_user_story: As a Raft node, I want to communicate with other nodes over gRPC so that I can participate in leader election, log replication, and consensus operations.
raw_criteria: Nodes can send and receive Raft RPC messages (AppendEntries, RequestVote, InstallSnapshot) over gRPC
Network layer handles connection management, retries, and timeouts automatically
Messages are serialized using Protocol Buffers for efficient transport
Network errors are properly propagated to the Raft layer for handling
Multiple nodes can communicate concurrently without blocking
raw_rules: TLS optional in Phase 1, required in Phase 4

included: gRPC service definition for Raft RPC messages
Server implementation for receiving Raft messages
Client implementation for sending messages to peers
excluded: Streaming for large snapshots (optimization for later)
